  • Uses of EntityCache in st.orm.core.repository.impl

    Methods in st.orm.core.repository.impl that return types with arguments of type EntityCache
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Optional<EntityCache<E,ID>>
    EntityRepositoryImpl.entityCache()
    Returns the entity cache for the current transaction, if available.
    Methods in st.orm.core.repository.impl with parameters of type EntityCache
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected List<ID>
    EntityRepositoryImpl.doUpsertAndFetchIdsBatch(List<E> batch, PreparedQuery query, EntityCache<E,ID> cache)
    Performs the SQL-level upsert for a batch of entities and returns their IDs, without lifecycle callbacks.
    protected void
    EntityRepositoryImpl.doUpsertBatch(List<E> batch, PreparedQuery query, EntityCache<E,ID> cache)
    Performs the SQL-level upsert for a batch of entities, without lifecycle callbacks.
    protected Optional<Set<Metamodel<?,?>>>
    EntityRepositoryImpl.getDirty(E entity, EntityCache<E,ID> cache)
    Returns the dirty fields of the entity, an empty set if all fields must be regarded as dirty, or an empty optional if the entity is not dirty.
    protected void
    EntityRepositoryImpl.update(List<E> batch, PreparedQuery query, EntityCache<E,ID> cache)
     
    protected List<E>
    EntityRepositoryImpl.updateAndFetch(List<E> batch, PreparedQuery query, EntityCache<E,ID> cache)
     
    protected List<ID>
    EntityRepositoryImpl.updateAndFetchIds(List<E> batch, PreparedQuery query, EntityCache<E,ID> cache)
     

  • Uses of EntityCache in st.orm.core.spi

    Classes in st.orm.core.spi that implement EntityCache
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    EntityCacheImpl<E extends Entity<ID>,ID>
    Transaction-local cache that interns entities by primary key with configurable retention behavior.
    Methods in st.orm.core.spi that return EntityCache
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EntityCache<? extends Entity<?>,?>
    TransactionContext.entityCache(Class<? extends Entity<?>> entityType, CacheRetention retention)
    Returns a transaction-local cache for entities of the given type, creating one with the specified retention behavior if it does not yet exist.
    EntityCache<? extends Entity<?>,?>
    TransactionContext.findEntityCache(Class<? extends Entity<?>> entityType)
    Returns an existing transaction-local cache for entities of the given type, or null if none exists.
    EntityCache<? extends Entity<?>,?>
    TransactionContext.getEntityCache(Class<? extends Entity<?>> entityType)
    Returns an existing transaction-local cache for entities of the given type.
